steps.title: Focus on community connections
steps.content: The students concluded that the garden fostered connections between volunteers and other residents who were not volunteering. The supporting quote must show interaction between those two groups.

steps.title: Reject personal or garden-only details
steps.content: Choice A discusses choosing plants for the climate and soil. Choice C describes enjoying nature. Choice D describes personal pride in the garden. None of these shows volunteers connecting with other residents.

steps.title: Use the resident interaction
steps.content: The remaining quote describes volunteers consulting expert gardeners in the neighborhood who were eager to help and learn more, illustrating the claimed connection. The answer is B.
